hypothesis: The combination of MACD, Aroon and Momentum indicators can optimize entries in VWAP on the 0GUSDC market by filtering out false signals and capturing trending movements.

Using MACD, Aroon and Momentum in combination with Bollinger bands, ATR based risk management and a stop at the middle Bollinger band or an ADX below 20 for exit can potentially optimize entries into Vwap on 0GUSDC.
